---
title: "Matej Gazda"
subtitle: "Artificial Intelligence | Medical Imaging"
image: assets/avatar.jpg
image-alt: "Portrait of Matej Gazda"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/BraveDistribution
    - icon: rss
      text: RSS
      href: posts/index.xml
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/matej-gazda-579a36100/
    # - icon: twitter-x
    #   text: X
    #   href: https://x.com/USERNAME
    # - icon: mortarboard-fill
    #   text: Scholar
    #   href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ID
    # - icon: envelope
    #   text: Email
    #   href: mailto:you@example.com
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

I am an **AI researcher and consultant** working at the intersection of
**machine learning** and **medical imaging**, with a long-standing curiosity
for the engineering and statistical foundations that make modern ML work.

This is the slow-form home for my [writing](posts/index.qmd),
[publications](publications.qmd), and [projects](projects.qmd).

::: {.eyebrow}
Currently
:::

::: {.now-grid}
::: {.now-card}
### Research
Building models for clinical imaging that are robust, sample-efficient, and
honest about uncertainty.
:::

::: {.now-card}
### Writing
Paper notes, ML walkthroughs, and the occasional engineering rabbit hole.
:::
:::

[Browse all posts →](posts/index.qmd){.see-all}
